name: Tortilla Chip Wreath
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a cookie sheet with waxed paper and draw a 6-inch circle on the paper.
2. In a large, microwave-safe bowl, combine the candy coating and shortening.
3. Microwave on MEDIUM for 6-7 minutes or until well melted, stirring once halfway through melting.
4. Stir until smooth.
5. Dip chips one at a time in the candy coating, removing excess with a spoon.
6. Arrange coated chips randomly around the outside of the 6-inch circle.
7. Continue to overlap and stack chips in wreath shape.
8. Decorate with gumdrops.
9. Let stand until set.
